notableEvents.label: Wilyer Abreu GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Wilyer Abreu grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Thomas Saggese to first baseman Ramón Urías. Willson Contreras out at 2nd. Wilyer Abreu out at 1st.
